news.headline: Analysts Maintain Delcath Systems Buy Ratings with $21 Target
news.summary: Craig-Hallum reaffirmed a Buy rating on DCTH with a price target around $21, well above the current share price. Continued sell-side confidence rests on the HEPZATO commercial ramp and pipeline expansion.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Announces First Patient Dosed in Phase 2 Clinical Trial of HEPZATO in Liver-Dominant Metastatic Breast Cancer
news.summary: First patient dosed at the European Institute of Oncology in Milan in the ~90-patient randomized DELUMA trial (NCT06875128) evaluating HEPZATO plus standard of care in HER2-negative liver-dominant metastatic breast cancer. This is the key pipeline expansion beyond ocular melanoma into a much larger indication.

news.headline: Delcath Systems (NASDAQ:DCTH) Stock Rating Upgraded by Zacks Research
news.summary: Zacks Research upgraded DCTH from a "strong sell" rating to a "hold" rating, part of a broader mix of analyst views (average rating "Moderate Buy", average target near $22.50) as the stock trades near its 52-week highs.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Added to Russell 2000 Value, 2500 Value, 3000 Value and Microcap Value Benchmarks
news.summary: DCTH was included in several Russell value benchmarks (Russell 2000 Value, 2500 Value, 3000 Value, Microcap Value and 2000 Defensive) in the annual reconstitution. Index membership broadens passive-fund ownership, visibility and liquidity for the small-cap name.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Announces Two ASCO 2026 Investigator Initiated Trials-in-Progress Abstracts
news.summary: Two investigator-initiated trials-in-progress abstracts featuring HEPZATO were presented at the 2026 ASCO annual meeting, expanding clinical evidence and physician engagement. Reinforces the growing academic base supporting HEPZATO across indications.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Reports First Quarter 2026 Results: $25M Revenue, $100M+ Full-Year Outlook Reiterated
news.summary: Q1 2026 revenue rose to $25.0M (from $19.8M a year earlier) with HEPZATO KIT contributing $23.3M at ~85% gross margin and ~36% HEPZATO volume growth; the company held $89.3M cash with no debt and reiterated at least $100M full-year 2026 revenue guidance.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings
catalysts.detail: Second-quarter results expected in early August (Q2 2025 was reported August 6), a key test of the $100M+ full-year revenue guidance and HEPZATO KIT volume growth after a strong Q1.

catalysts.label: $100M+ revenue target
catalysts.detail: Full-year 2026 guidance of at least $100M revenue implies substantial HEPZATO KIT volume growth over 2025; execution against this is the primary near-term driver.

catalysts.label: DELUMA breast cancer trial ramp
catalysts.detail: Phase 2 HEPZATO metastatic breast cancer trial (NCT06875128, ~90 patients) now dosing after first patient in Milan on July 9; US/EU site activation and enrollment updates expected ahead.

catalysts.label: mCRC Phase 2 interim data / indication expansion
catalysts.detail: Ongoing colorectal-cancer Phase 2 work plus CHOPIN combination data (Lancet Oncology publication showed improved PFS with HEPZATO plus immunotherapy) underpin label/indication expansion potential.

pulse: Delcath keeps executing: Q1 revenue of $25M at ~85% gross margin, ~36% HEPZATO volume growth, $89M cash with no debt, reiterated $100M+ 2026 guidance, and the DELUMA breast cancer trial has now dosed its first patient, marking the move beyond uveal melanoma into a far larger market. Russell value-index inclusion, a Zacks upgrade to hold, and reaffirmed Craig-Hallum Buy/$21 target support the story, even as the stock trades near 52-week highs with a wide range of analyst price targets ($18-$30). Near-term focus is the early-August Q2 print as the first real test of the full-year guidance.
